data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. DROVER'S GOLD progressive type who recorded his 1st career win last time out (20.10) at this track. Drawn the rails and rates a key runner. 2. HARA'S LOKI turned in a plain performance last time when sixth at Q Lakeside over 457m behind Juan Bandito (26.08) in a Grade 6. Placed at his previous run. Consistent performer from this draw with a win and two minor placings to his credit. Great chance to atone. 7. PSIONIC PROWESS clocked a new course and distance PB last time, finishing a 3.5 lengths third behind Daysea's Max in 20.02. In form and looks a leading player again. 8. SUNLIT AMBER cannot be left out over a shorter journey.","runners":[1,2,7,8],"exclusive":false}
